events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **pass** — the crew's Andon/quality-response method, though less tidy than the shop's preferred approach, still satisfies the listed product instructions and project requirement, and nothing in the site quality procedures (no local amendment or drawing note) prohibits it. Risk is low; recommended actions are to let work continue, log the method variance for traceability, and flag it to engineering as a possible standard-work update.
